name: verso-notebook
description: Interactive .NET notebooks with C#, F#, PowerShell, Python, SQL, IntelliSense, database connectivity, and EF Core scaffolding

verso.hostPath.description: Path to the Verso.Host.dll. If empty, uses bundled host.

chatParticipants.name: verso
chatParticipants.description: Create, edit, run, and explore Verso notebook cells

commands.name: cells
commands.description: List all cells in the active notebook

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run all cells in the active notebook

languageModelTools.name: verso_listCells
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all cells in the active Verso notebook, showing each cell's source code, language, and outputs.

languageModelTools.name: verso_addCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a new cell to the Verso notebook. The 'type' field determines the cell kind. For code cells, also set 'language' to the kernel. For non-code types (markdown, html, mermaid, etc.), only type is needed. Refer to the system prompt for available cell types and languages.

language.description: The kernel language for code cells. Not needed for non-code cell types. Refer to the system prompt for available languages.

source.description: The source code or content for the cell

type.description: The cell type. Use 'code' for executable code cells (requires language). Other types vary by notebook. Refer to the system prompt for available types.

position.description: 1-based position to insert the cell at. If omitted, the cell is added at the end.

languageModelTools.name: verso_updateCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update the source code of an existing cell. Use the 1-based cell number (call verso_listCells first to find it).

source.description: The new source code for the cell

languageModelTools.name: verso_removeCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a cell from the notebook by its 1-based cell number.

languageModelTools.name: verso_runCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a specific cell by its 1-based cell number and return the output.

languageModelTools.name: verso_runAll
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute all cells in the notebook sequentially and return results.

languageModelTools.name: verso_listVariables
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all variables currently in scope in the notebook kernel, showing name, type, and value preview.

languageModelTools.name: verso_inspectVariable
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the detailed value of a specific variable by name.

languageModelTools.name: verso_getLanguages
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List the available languages/kernels for the active notebook.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:host && npm run build:wasm && npm run build
